topic: The peephole in my apartment door shows a hallway that is not the one outside
title: The Peephole in My Front Door Shows a Hallway That Is Not Mine | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The peephole in my front door shows a hallway that is not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass peephole on a white apartment front door, the tiny lens catching dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Fourth floor apartment. Carpeted hall, beige walls. Lived here three years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a carpeted apartment hallway with beige walls and evenly spaced doors, dim sconce lighting, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of an eye approaching a door peephole from inside, only the door and brass fitting visible, dim entry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night the peephole showed bare concrete and a flickering bulb. I opened the door anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: fisheye distorted view through a peephole showing a bare concrete corridor with a single flickering bulb overhead, deep shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My own hallway was there. Beige. Carpeted.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a normal carpeted beige apartment hallway seen through an open doorway, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Closed again, the peephole showed concrete. And a door across from mine.
scenes.image_prompt: fisheye peephole view of a concrete corridor with a single plain door directly across, dim flickering light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There is no door across from mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a white apartment door interior with a brass peephole, dim entry, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Through the glass, that door began to open.
scenes.image_prompt: fisheye peephole view of a plain door across a concrete hall beginning to open into darkness, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now every night the concrete hallway is there. The far door opens a little more.
scenes.image_prompt: fisheye peephole view of a concrete corridor, the far door open wider revealing black space beyond, flickering bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night something stood in the gap, close to the glass, looking back at me.
scenes.image_prompt: fisheye peephole view with a dark indistinct figure standing close to the lens in a concrete hallway, no face visible, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered the peephole with tape and hung a coat over it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a front door peephole covered with masking tape and a coat hung over it, dim entry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the tape was on the floor. Peeled off from the outside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a strip of masking tape lying on a carpeted hallway floor outside an apartment door, dim hall light, vertical 9:16 framing
